title: Goety Ominous
description: This Goety addon adds more servants and more staff to play.
body:
# Goety Ominous

Goety Ominous(old some illager servants mod) is an addon for Goety that expands your army with new servant types — now going beyond just Illagers and covering a wider range of creatures from various popular mods.

Beyond new servants, the mod introduces cross-mod compatibility that allows you to summon creatures from other mods using Goety's core mechanics. It bridges the gap between Goety's necromancy system and other beloved mods, offering new strategic options for commanding your army.

## Key Features

New Servant Types And More Spells
The core of the mod. Summon and command a diverse array of new servants, each with unique behaviors and abilities.Also don't forget to check the new spells!


### Illage and Spillage

### Savage & Ravage

### Upgrade Aquatic

### Mutant More

### More in future updates!

## Cross-Mod Compatibility
Place items from supported mods on Pedestal Blocks to summon their respective servant types.


## Configurable Attributes
Highly customizable via someillagerservants-common.toml.

Adjust health, damage, speed, armor, and follow range for each servant type

Fine-tune balancing to your preference


## Requirements

Goety (required)

Illage and Spillage: Respillaged (Now Required ,soon will be Optional)

Savage & Ravage (Optional)

Upgrade Aquatic (Optional)

Mutant More (Optional)


## Future Plans

Even more cross-mod compatibility

New servant types from various popular mods, not limited to Illager-themed content

Custom summoning mechanics


## Credits

Special thanks to k1sak1 for helping with modding!
